message:
feat(cli,fuse,mvcc): expand evidence collection, harden per-core FUSE and WAL writer

Extend cmd_evidence with broader evidence-gathering capabilities and add
new CLI subcommand wiring in main.rs. Improve ffs-fuse per_core.rs with
more robust per-CPU dispatch and error handling. Harden WAL writer with
better fsync sequencing and crash-recovery semantics. Add new core lib
helper exports.

- Evidence CLI: 78 new lines of evidence collection logic
- FUSE per-core: improved CPU affinity and dispatch (40 lines changed)
- MVCC WAL writer: fsync ordering improvements (22 lines changed)
- Beads issue tracker state updated

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
